items.front: Weather deviation tool: what does CDI stand for?
items.back: Converging, Diverging, and Intersecting. The tool adds this mileage buffer to required separation when RNP distance-based longitudinal separation is applied. Per 13-2-5.

items.front: Weather deviation: pink advisory with zero or positive +/- value
items.back: Aircraft pair is at or close to the required spacing. Requires FURTHER EVALUATION before approving the weather deviation clearance. Per 13-2-5(a-b).

items.front: Weather deviation tool: CDI buffer enforcement and ADS-C rate
items.back: CDI mileage buffer enforced by ATOP conflict probe. ATOP enforces an increased ADS-C reporting rate of 64 seconds. Per 13-2-5 NOTE.

items.front: ATOP automated coordination: two exceptions to complete coordination
items.back: 1. Aircraft is in conflict with another in the receiving sector. 2. When otherwise specified in facility directives or LOA. Per 13-2-6.

items.front: ATOP multiple-person operation: two governing requirements
items.back: 1. All ATC tasks completed according to priority of duties. 2. Multiple controller operation accomplished according to facility directives. Per 13-2-7.
